name: Banana Coconut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the currants with 1/2 cup of dark rum and set aside for 1 hour.
2. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, salt, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and 2/3 cup of sweetened coconut.
3. Cream the vegetable shortening and brown sugar in a large bowl until combined.
4. Beat in the eggs, then add the buttermilk and mashed ripe banana. Stir until well combined.
5. Gradually stir in the flour mixture until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan (9" x 5" x 2 3/4").
7. Sprinkle with remaining sweetened coconut.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 60 to 70 minutes, or until done. Makes 1 loaf.
